seoTitle: Huonville vs Ida Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Huonville and Ida Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Huonville vs Ida Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Huonville and Ida Bay.
heading: Huonville vs Ida Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Huonville, Tasmania and Ida Bay, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Huonville has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Ida Bay (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Huonville or Ida Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Huonville has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Ida Bay scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Huonville scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Ida Bay scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Huonville or Ida Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Huonville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
